name: Mileage Reimbursement Work Injury Millcreek

mainEntity.name: Does workers comp cover mileage to therapy in Millcreek after work injury?
mainEntity.text: Does workers comp cover mileage to therapy in Millcreek after work injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah workers comp reimburses mileage to/from all approved medical appointments, including therapy, at the state rate (typically 65.5 cents/mile in 2023—check current)[1].

suggestedAnswer.text: Full medical coverage in Millcreek includes travel reimbursement for doctor visits, PT, and prescriptions. Submit odometer readings with claims; insurers often underpay—track meticulously. Permanent disability may add awards. Verify rates annually via Labor Commission[1][3].
